summary: Well-structured test suite with comprehensive coverage of core functionality. Tests cover secret loading, status classification (expired/warning/ok), report generation, markdown/JSON formatting, error handling, and workflow structure validation. Strengths: clear separation of concerns, good fixture usage, boundary condition testing, integration with act harness. Gaps: no CLI argument parsing tests, missing edge cases for malformed input (bad dates, missing required fields, negative rotation_days), loose assertion in markdown summary test (checks multiple possible formats suggesting output format isn't stable). Fixture files referenced but not shown, preventing verification of test data. Would reliably catch most regressions in core logic and CI pipeline.
